text.title: AI Leverage Estimation Model Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a leverage-adjusted estimate end-to-end. Each step names its input artefact, action, output, and a decision-gate.

step.name: decompose-wbs
step.action: Decompose scope into named leaf tasks. Each leaf has a one-sentence success criterion. Stop when leaves are 4-16h of raw work.
step.decision-gate: If any leaf >16h raw, split. If any leaf <1h raw, merge.

step.name: classify-leaves
step.action: Assign each leaf to one of {glue, scaffold, tests, business-logic, regulated, novel}. If a leaf straddles two classes, split it.
step.decision-gate: If any leaf cannot be classified, STOP and apply `skip-this-methodology` for that leaf.

step.name: assign-multiplier-bands
step.input: Classified leaves + operator throughput log (last 90 days)
step.action: For each class present, pull ≥1 evidence row from the log. Derive low/mid/high band from observed planned/actual ratios. Use the current quarter's band-version.
step.decision-gate: If <1 evidence row for a class, fall back to PERT for those leaves (set fallback_reason on them).

step.name: compute-and-audit
step.action: Compute adjusted_hours = raw_hours / multiplier_band per leaf, per band corner. Sum totals. Run `scripts/validate-ai-leverage-estimation-model.py` against the resulting JSON.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix violations before sending to buyer.

step.name: post-engagement-calibration
step.action: Append actual hours to the operator's throughput log per leaf. Surface any leaf where actual was >2x mid-band into the engagement's lessons-learned record.
step.decision-gate: At quarter-end, re-derive multiplier bands; bump band_version.
